title: Resellers
description: Manage all reseller partners on the platform.

tierDescriptions.FULL_MANAGEMENT: Can manage institutes, billing, and configurations end-to-end.
tierDescriptions.SUPPORT_MANAGEMENT: Can assist institutes but cannot modify billing or config.
tierDescriptions.READ_ONLY: Can view institute data and reports but cannot make changes.

empty.title: No resellers found
empty.description: No resellers match your current filters.
empty.noDataDescription: Create the first reseller partner to get started.

detail.title: Reseller Details
detail.systemNote: This is the built-in Roviq Direct reseller. It cannot be suspended, deleted, or have its tier changed.
detail.institutesPlaceholder: Institutes assigned to this reseller will be listed here in a future release.
detail.teamPlaceholder: Reseller team members and role assignments will be shown here in a future release.
detail.activityPlaceholder: The reseller's audit trail will appear here in a future release.
detail.billingPlaceholder: Reseller billing summary and invoices will appear here in a future release.

actions.editDescription: Update name, branding, or custom domain.
actions.changeTierDescription: Changing the tier updates all staff role permissions immediately on their next login.
actions.suspendDescription: Suspending this reseller will revoke all staff sessions. Their institutes remain accessible directly by Roviq. Provide an optional reason.
actions.suspendReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this reseller is being suspended…
actions.unsuspendDescription: This will restore the reseller to active status and allow staff to log in again.
actions.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove this reseller. All institutes must be reassigned before deletion. This action cannot be undone.
actions.deleteGracePeriod: Resellers can only be deleted 30 days after suspension.

create.title: Create Reseller
create.description: Register a new reseller partner on the platform.

sections.identityDescription: Name, slug, and tier of the new reseller.
sections.adminDescription: An admin account will be created and linked to this reseller.
sections.brandingDescription: Optional brand colours and logo for the reseller portal.

create.name: Reseller Name
create.nameDescription: Full name of the reseller organisation.
create.slugDescription: URL-safe identifier (lowercase, hyphens). Auto-generated from name if left blank. Cannot be changed after creation.
create.slugHelpBody: The slug is used in reseller portal URLs and API paths. It must be globally unique and cannot be changed after creation (e.g. acme-partners → reseller.roviq.com/acme-partners).
create.slugPattern: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (e.g. acme-partners).
create.tierDescription: Controls what this reseller can do with its assigned institutes.
create.initialAdminEmailDescription: An account will be created or linked for this email address with reseller admin access.
create.customDomainDescription: Optional vanity domain for the reseller portal (e.g. portal.acme.com).
create.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
create.slugInvalid: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
create.slugTooShort: Slug must be at least 2 characters.
create.slugTooLong: Slug must be 100 characters or fewer.
create.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
create.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or fewer.
create.domainInvalid: Please enter a valid fully qualified domain name.
create.colorInvalid: Please enter a valid hex color (e.g. #1677FF).
